scene: Teen blob Byte sits at desk in warm golden afternoon light, turning head upward to admire the trophy shelf while the laptop waits open beside them

subjects.description: Byte, a small round blue blob with gangly teen limbs, big expressive eyes, sitting upright on a chair
subjects.position: primary foreground center, seated at desk
subjects.action: head tilted upward, eyes gazing admiringly at the trophy shelf above, one hand resting on desk near laptop keyboard

subjects.description: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop open, Chicago skyline visible through a simple window to the left
subjects.action: static environment anchor, laptop screen softly glowing

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: warm golden afternoon sunlight streaming through the window, casting soft warm tones across the room and desk
mood: ecstatic admiration and patient pride, upward gaze conveying pride in achievement
background: trophy shelf on wall above desk with exactly one golden trophy on the left and exactly one small green plant on the right, clearly spaced apart; exactly one food bowl on the floor to the right of the desk with moderate kibble
composition: Byte centered at desk facing viewer slightly, head angled up toward shelf; shelf visible in upper area; window with Chicago skyline to the left; food bowl on floor lower right
